requestBody.title: Dexter T-Shirt | The Bay Harbor Butcher Tee | Vintage TV Show Shirt | Michael C. Hall Fan Gift | Retro Crime Drama Series Merch Oversized
requestBody.description:
Embrace your inner dark passenger with our exclusive Dexter T-Shirt, a must-have for any fan of the iconic crime drama series! This vintage-inspired tee features a striking distressed red graphic of Dexter Morgan, complete with the chilling moniker 'The Bay Harbor Butcher' emblazoned above.

Crafted from premium, soft cotton, this unisex t-shirt offers a comfortable, relaxed fit perfect for everyday wear. The washed black fabric gives it a classic, retro feel, making it look like a cherished piece from your favorite era. Whether you're re-watching the series, heading to a fan convention, or just showcasing your love for one of television's most complex characters, this shirt is designed to impress.

It's an ideal gift for Dexter enthusiasts, a unique addition to your TV show merchandise collection, or a cool statement piece for Halloween. Stand out with this subtly dark and stylish tribute to Dexter Morgan.

**Product Details:**
*   Material: 100% Soft, breathable cotton
*   Fit: Unisex, relaxed/oversized fit (size up for a more baggy look)
*   Color: Washed Black with distressed Red graphic
*   Design: Dexter Morgan 'Bay Harbor Butcher' graphic print
*   Care Instructions: Machine wash cold, inside out, with like colors. Tumble dry low or hang dry for best results. Do not iron directly on the design.

Show your allegiance to the code with this unique Dexter tee!
